description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black metal pot with a wide open top and two sturdy side handles. The pot has a smooth, matte finish and appears to be constructed from a single piece of metal, likely steel or aluminum, with no visible seams or reinforcements. The handles are robust and integrated into the sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding liquids or bulk materials. There are no visible markings, labels, or decorative elements on the exterior, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The object is most likely used in urban or industrial settings for tasks such as carrying water, cooking, or storing materials.
description: A large, black metal pot with two side handles and a wide open top, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both side handles and the wide open top of the pot.
description_view_1: Side view with one handle visible and the other obscured, emphasizing the cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with both handles visible and the open top clearly shown.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, with one handle visible and the other hidden.
